notes.text: Only the GalleryGrid.tsx component is byte-identical across food/property. Column-building DIFFERS: food uses shared app/foodphotography/galleryColumns.ts buildColumns(photos, layout) with config; property/page.tsx has its own inline buildColumns(photos) with hardcoded length-based (16/14/9/6/default) layouts. So extract/share only GalleryGrid, NOT the column logic.

Curated-order nav needs GalleryGrid to know each thumbnail's index in the flat curated photos[] array. Reference equality is unreliable because forcedRatio overrides create NEW photo objects (food applyPhotoOverrides, property spreads {...photos[3], forcedRatio}). Plan must pass the flat ordered photos[] list (or per-thumbnail flat index) into the shared GalleryGrid, not rely on object identity or src matching.

payload.context: Discuss: correcting duplication scope + identity challenge for curated-order nav
